_comment: Ground truth for the pinned evaluation testbed (evaluation/docker-compose.yml).
Every open port + service name below is fixed by the pinned container images, so
detection_benchmark.py can compute true precision/recall — nothing is assumed.
'planted_cves' lists CVEs a version-accurate scanner MUST recall on that host.
Any reported CVE not planted is surfaced as 'unexpected' for operator review;
on the pinned/patched hosts (empty planted list) an unexpected CVE is a candidate
false positive. 'decoy_ports' are ports the scan probes but that are CLOSED, so
reporting one as open is a hard false positive (scored in port precision).
